title: ExchangeReceipt
description: A receipt acknowledging the reception and validation of an artifact exchanged between nodes in the OpenClaw runtime.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this exchange receipt.

artifact_id.description: The identifier of the artifact that was received.

origin_node.description: The identifier of the node that sent the artifact.

received_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the artifact was received.

validation_status.description: The outcome of validating the received artifact.

validator_signer_fingerprint.description: Optional fingerprint of the key used by the validator.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this exchange.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this exchange receipt.
